title: 10 Signs You're Letting the Phone Win
caption:
The phone isn't just a distraction. It's a war.

Your grandfather never had to fight this. This is your generation's specific battle — the place where lust lives, where envy lives, where time goes and never comes back, where you manage your sin instead of killing it.

The man who can't put his phone down at 1 AM has something other than Christ owning that part of his life. That's not a soft take. That's just what's true.

If something on this list stopped you cold — that's not guilt. That's an invitation to fight.

Save this. Send it to the brother who's been meaning to cut back.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #phonefasting #digitaldetox #thework
